creator: jjuanino@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 158624
Patch to make the update of the port

Dear FreeBSD committer:

I send a patch to update datamodeler port from  4.0.0.833 to 4.1.1.887 version

# cd /usr/ports/databases/datamodeler
# patch -p1 < patch_datamodeler.diff
# rm *.orig files/*.orig


Best regards
